response:
Last month the Azure‑PROD schema recorded two changes:

- Added a new resource group rax-prod-sentinel-rg (for the Project Sentinel pilot).  
- Updated NSG rules on rax-prod-apim-subnet to allow outbound traffic to Azure AI (the source text is truncated; it refers to allowing outbound to Azure AI endpoints/services).

If you want the exact NSG destinations/ports or the change request/PR that implemented this, I can fetch those details.
